Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}As I'm sure you are aware, you are currently in a dream.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Now, then. There has been a change in you recently. Have you noticed?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}I do not speak of your change in circumstances.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}I refer to the change in your mentality.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}That is why I have summoned you here tonight.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Going forward, there is one thing you mustn't forget.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The paper I signed at the[n]dorm is lying before Igor...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}You do recognize it—I can see that. Shall I remind you of your commitment?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}"I choose this fate of mine own free will."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}No matter which path you choose, I shall respect your decision.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}However, you alone must bear the responsibility for your actions.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}No matter what sort of end they may bring about.[n]{f 1 1}
